title: Codex自充能永续运行
summary: CLI额度耗尽时自动切换到Codex IDE继续执行任务
trigger_pattern: codex 额度 充能 自充值 永续 credits
template_code:
# codex_charger.py
def run_via_codex(prompt):
    driver = uc.Chrome()
    driver.get('https://claude.ai/code')
    # paste prompt, wait, extract
